summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 8 features: Strategy Replay (8 historical events), Options P&L Payoff Diagrams (6 strategies), Tiered Take-Profit tracking, and Auto Regime-Change Notifications. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working with Replay tab, Payoff Diagram panel, and notification bell.
passed_tests: Replay Events List: GET /api/replay/events returns 8 historical events with correct structure
Replay Hormuz 2024: GET /api/replay/hormuz_2024 returns bars[], analytics{}, event{} with spike_up trajectory
Replay COVID Crash 2020: GET /api/replay/covid_crash_2020 returns mega_crash trajectory with negative return
Replay Russia-Ukraine 2022: GET /api/replay/russia_ukraine_2022 returns mega_spike trajectory with positive return
Replay Invalid Event: GET /api/replay/invalid_event returns 404
Payoff Straddle: GET /api/options/payoff/straddle returns data[], max_profit, max_loss, breakeven_points (2 points)
Payoff Iron Condor: GET /api/options/payoff/iron_condor returns payoff data
Payoff Butterfly: GET /api/options/payoff/butterfly returns payoff data
Payoff Calendar Spread: GET /api/options/payoff/calendar_spread returns payoff data
Payoff Ratio Spread: GET /api/options/payoff/ratio_spread returns payoff data
Payoff Strangle: GET /api/options/payoff/strangle returns payoff data
Payoff Invalid Strategy: GET /api/options/payoff/invalid returns 400
Bot Status: GET /api/bot/status returns enabled, min_confidence, scan_interval_sec, max_daily_trades
Bot Toggle: POST /api/bot/toggle toggles bot on/off correctly
Fragility: GET /api/fragility returns score, level, size_multiplier
Signal Score: GET /api/signal-score/CL returns bullish_pct, bearish_pct, direction
Risk Control: GET /api/risk-control/status returns can_trade, equity
Notifications: GET /api/notifications returns notifications list with unread_count
Bot Opportunities: Opportunities have take_profit_1, take_profit_2, stop_loss for tiered TP tracking
Frontend: Replay tab visible in navigation
Frontend: Replay tab shows 8 event cards after clicking 'Load Historical Events'
Frontend: Replay event shows price chart and analytics (Initial, Final, Return, Max DD, Avg Fragility, Bars)
Frontend: Options tab has P&L Payoff Diagram panel
Frontend: Payoff Diagram has 6 strategy buttons (straddle, strangle, iron_condor, butterfly, calendar_spread, ratio_spread)
Frontend: Payoff chart renders with Spot, Max Profit, Max Loss, Breakeven points
Frontend: Notification bell shows unread count badge
Frontend: Notification dropdown shows regime change notifications
seed_data_creation: None required - replay events are pre-defined in HISTORICAL_EVENTS dict
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully functional. Strategy Replay has 8 historical events (hormuz_2024, opec_cut_2023, svb_2023, russia_ukraine_2022, covid_crash_2020, eia_surprise_draw, fed_hawkish_2024, china_stimulus_2024). Each replay returns bars[], analytics{}, event{}. Options Payoff Diagram supports 6 strategies (straddle, strangle, iron_condor, butterfly, calendar_spread, ratio_spread). Tiered Take-Profit tracking in bot opportunities (take_profit_1, take_profit_2). Auto regime-change notifications appear in notification bell. All features from iterations 1-7 continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.note: All trading is simulated via PaperBroker. Market data is simulated. Replay events use pre-defined trajectories.

tiered_take_profit.description: Bot opportunities include take_profit_1 (TP1) and take_profit_2 (TP2) levels
tiered_take_profit.partial_close: 50% at TP1, move SL to breakeven, close rest at TP2

regime_notifications.description: Auto regime-change notifications sent when regime changes
regime_notifications.implementation: bot_scanner_loop() checks last_regime_notified and broadcasts notification
